login.title: Sign in to your account
login.mfaDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app, or a recovery code.

errors.oauth_failed: OAuth authentication failed. Please try again.
errors.access_denied: Access was denied. Please try again.
errors.missing_code: Authentication code was missing. Please try again.
errors.no_email: No email address associated with your account. Please try again.
errors.tooManyAttemptsWithWait: Too many login attempts. Try again in {wait} seconds.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.agreeToTerms: I agree to the <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>
signup.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
signup.invalidEmailInline: Please enter a valid email address
signup.passwordTooWeak: Password is too weak. Use at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and numbers.
signup.mustAgreeToTerms: You must agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
signup.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.description: No worries. Enter your email and we'll send you reset instructions.
forgotPassword.successDescription: If an account exists for {email}, we've sent password reset instructions to your inbox.
forgotPassword.successHintBefore: Didn't receive the email? Check your spam folder or
forgotPassword.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.description: Your new password must be different from your previous password.
resetPassword.invalidLinkDescription: This password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.successDescription: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in with your new password.
resetPassword.passwordTooWeak: Password is too weak. Use at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and numbers.
resetPassword.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

sidebar.deleteFolderConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? Projects inside this folder will be moved to the root level.
sidebar.upgradeDescription: Get unlimited projects and priority AI generation.

suggestions: Build a SaaS landing page with pricing...
Create a portfolio website with animations...
Make an e-commerce store with checkout...
Build a blog with markdown support...

chatInput.strategizeTitle: Strategize first, then do the work
chatInput.frameworkPickerTitle: Pick framework explicitly, or let the server detect from your prompt

dashboard.createProjectFailed: Failed to create project. Please try again.

empty.noSearchMatch: No projects match "{query}". Try a different search.
empty.getStarted: Describe what you want to build in the chat above, or import an existing project from GitHub.

pagination.showing: Showing {shown} of {total} project{total, plural, one {} other {s}}{search, select, empty {} other { matching "{search}"}}

dialogs.deleteProjectConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
dialogs.deleteProjectsConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {count} selected project{count, plural, one {} other {s}}? This action cannot be undone.
dialogs.moveToFolderDescription: Choose a folder for this project.
dialogs.noFoldersHint: No folders yet. Create one in the sidebar.

createProject.title: Create a new project
createProject.description: Start from scratch, describe what you want, or pick a template.
createProject.promptLabel: What do you want to build?
createProject.slugMinLength: Slug must be at least 3 characters

workspaceSwitcher.noEnvironments: No environments available. Create one from the editor.

importGitHub.title: Import from GitHub
importGitHub.alreadyImported: This repository was already imported. Check your projects list.
importGitHub.switchAccountTitle: Disconnect this GitHub account and connect a different one
importGitHub.largeRepoHint: This may take a moment for large repositories
importGitHub.description: Import an existing repository to continue working on it in Doable.
importGitHub.connectDescription: Authorize Doable to access your repositories.
importGitHub.switchAccountConfirm: Disconnect {username} and connect a different one?
importGitHub.switchAccountConfirmHint: Existing project-to-repo links won't be deleted, but new pushes/pulls and imports will use the next account you sign in with.

workspaceSetup.environmentDescription: Every workspace needs an environment — it defines what your AI assistant knows and can do.
workspaceSetup.knowledgeDescription: Tell your AI what it should know about your projects. You can always add more later.
workspaceSetup.knowledgePlaceholder:
e.g. We use React with TypeScript.
Our API follows REST conventions.
Always use Tailwind for styling.
workspaceSetup.knowledgeHint: These instructions guide your AI assistant across all projects in this workspace.
workspaceSetup.integrationsDescription: Connect external tools to supercharge your workflow. You can set these up anytime from Settings.
workspaceSetup.integrationsHint: Integrations can be connected from workspace settings at any time.
workspaceSetup.doneDescription: {name} is ready to go. Start creating projects and let AI help you build.

welcome.title: Welcome to your Doable
welcome.description: You are the platform owner on this install. This short setup walks you through connecting an AI provider, sign-in options, and plans & billing — so your team can sign up and start building. Every step is optional and revisitable from /admin.
welcome.workspaceHint: This is the name shown to users on your install.

signInProviders.title: Sign-in providers
signInProviders.description: Let your users sign in with Google or GitHub. Register the callback URL in each provider's dashboard, then paste the credentials below.
signInProviders.registerCallback: 1. Register this callback URL in the {provider} developer console
signInProviders.credentialsSaved: Credentials saved. Value masked for security.
signInProviders.optionalNote: Sign-in providers are optional. You can configure them later in /admin.

github.label: GitHub
github.description: Sign-in + Copilot AI + repo push/pull — ONE OAuth App, register the parent URL below

supabase.label: Supabase
supabase.description: Lets users authorize Doable to provision Supabase projects on their behalf when the AI builds a backend-enabled app. Without this, users see a sign-in prompt mid-build.

plansBilling.title: Plans & billing
plansBilling.description: Pick which AI model each plan tier defaults to, then optionally wire up Stripe + signup policy. Everything here can be changed later in /admin.
plansBilling.signupApprovalHint: When ON, new signups stay pending until an admin approves them in /admin/signups. When OFF (default), anyone with a valid email can sign up immediately.
plansBilling.policySaveError: Could not save — try again or use /admin/signups
plansBilling.stripeExpandedHint: Paste your Stripe secret + webhook secret to enable Pro and Business plans.
plansBilling.stripeCollapsedHint: Optional — enable paid Pro/Business plans via Stripe.
plansBilling.stripePriceHint: Price IDs for Pro/Business can be added in /admin/billing.
plansBilling.planLimitsHint: Want to fine-tune what each plan (free / pro / business / enterprise) can do? Set projects-per-user, daily credits, file size limits, custom domains, and more in /admin/plan-limits — sensible defaults apply automatically until then.

planDefaults.loadError: Could not load plan defaults — you can configure them later in /admin/plans.
planDefaults.empty: No plan defaults configured. The provider you set in Step 3 should already be applied to all plans. If this list is empty, you can configure them later from /admin/plans.
planDefaults.title: AI model defaults per plan
planDefaults.description: The provider+model you chose in Step 3 was applied to all plans automatically. Optionally override the model for individual plans (e.g. a cheaper model on Free, a more capable one on Enterprise). You can change these any time in /admin/plans.
planDefaults.saveError: Could not save {plan} default — verify in /admin/plans after setup.

cloudflare.title: Cloudflare Tunnel
cloudflare.description: We strongly recommend running Doable behind a Cloudflare Tunnel. Your server never exposes ports 80 or 443 to the public internet — all traffic enters through Cloudflare's edge, with built-in DDoS protection and TLS.
cloudflare.loginStep: Log in to Cloudflare and create a tunnel:
cloudflare.allSetMessage: All set — your install is reachable through Cloudflare without exposing any ports.
cloudflare.skipConfirmDescription: Without Cloudflare your server will need ports 80 and 443 open to the public. You become directly responsible for DDoS handling, TLS cert renewal, and origin IP exposure. You can add Cloudflare later in /admin.

aiProvider.title: Connect an AI provider
aiProvider.description: Pick one to start — you can add more in /admin/ai-providers later.
aiProvider.noMatch: No providers match "{query}". Clear the search or toggle "Show all".
aiProvider.modelRequired: Pick or type a model — chat needs one to know which engine to call.
aiProvider.copilotConnectFirst: Click "Connect with GitHub" first — Copilot needs a connected account before saving.
aiProvider.copilotTimeout: Connection timed out. If you completed OAuth on GitHub, reload this page and check /admin/ai-settings.
aiProvider.noWorkspace: No workspace yet. Reload the page and try again.
aiProvider.popupBlocked: Popup blocked — allow popups for this site and try again.
aiProvider.setAsPlanDefault: Use this model as the default for every plan (Free, Pro, Business, Enterprise) and as the suggestions model. You can fine-tune per-plan and suggestions models later in /admin/plan-defaults.

templatesPage.title: Templates
templatesPage.subtitle: Start from a template to build your next project
templatesPage.noResultsCategory: No templates in this category yet.

templates.remixDescription: By remixing a project, you will create a copy that you own.
templates.createFailed: Failed to create project. Please try again.

page.signInPrompt: Please sign in to manage your subscription and credits.
page.title: Billing
page.subtitle: Manage your subscription, credits, and usage.
page.checkoutCanceled: Checkout was canceled. No changes were made.
page.plansLoadFailed: Unable to load plans. Please try again later.
page.noUsageHint: Credit usage will appear here once you start using AI features.

credits.title: Credits
credits.noInfo: No credit information available. Subscribe to a plan to get started.

general.descriptionPlaceholder: A brief description of your workspace

danger.transferDescription: Transfer ownership of this workspace to another member. You will be demoted to admin.
danger.deleteDescription: Permanently delete this workspace, all its projects, files, and member associations. This action cannot be undone.

members.membersDescription: People who have access to this workspace and its projects.
members.pendingDescription: Invites that have been sent but not yet accepted.
members.inviteLinkDescription: Generate a shareable link to invite people to this workspace.
members.inviteDialogDescription: Send an invite to join this workspace.
members.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {name} from this workspace? They will lose access to all projects.
